title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 528.320 - Copy of report and judgment to be recorded
text:
528.320.  Copy of report and judgment to be recorded. — The clerk of the court shall make out a certified copy of such report and of the judgment and confirmation and cause the same to be recorded in the office of the recorder of each county in which any of the estate thus divided is situated, the costs of such certified copy and recording to be taxed as other costs in the case.
(RSMo 1939 § 1740) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1576; 1919 § 2024; 1909 § 2588
